footer.description: An entrepreneurial and innovation community platform in Wadi Jeddah.

hero.title: Wadi Jeddah Innovation Hub: The Entrepreneurial Destination
hero.subtitle: Launch your idea in an integrated entrepreneurial environment designed to accelerate startup growth, and enjoy an unparalleled productive experience.

about.title: Wadi Jeddah Innovation Hub.. Where Ideas Grow
about.content: More than just a workspace; we are an integrated entrepreneurial ecosystem supporting innovators and startups. We empower creative minds through exclusive services and intensive programs to accelerate your journey to the future.

facilities.title: Workspaces That Scale With Your Ambition
facilities.content: Whether you're a freelancer or an expanding startup, we offer flexible and fully equipped environments:
list: Shared Offices: The perfect choice for flexible work within an interactive community.
Private Offices: Independent spaces ensuring privacy and focus for your team.
Event Halls: Smart venues equipped with the latest technologies for successful events.

services.title: An Integrated Ecosystem for Business Growth
services.content: Your success requires more than a desk. We provide all the facilities you need so you can focus solely on your innovation:
list: Digital Infrastructure: High-speed internet with continuous tech support.
High Security: 24/7 smart access with a comprehensive security system.
Well-being: Cafe, shared kitchen, recreational spaces, and personal lockers.
Business Incubator: Mentorship programs opening doors to investment.

community.title: Join an Inspiring Innovation Community
community.content: Innovation doesn't happen in isolation! Joining our Hub makes you part of a vibrant community of top innovators and investors. Exchange ideas, build strategic partnerships, and share your success story with us.

hero.title: Flexible & Fully-Equipped Offices for Your Growth
hero.subtitle: Choose the space that inspires your productivity at Wadi Jeddah Innovation Hub. Flexible, all-inclusive monthly plans with no hidden setup costs.

workspaces.intro: We provide a complete platform for success with premium workspaces equipped with advanced facilities to help you develop your innovations in a dynamic community.

hotDesk.title: 1. Hot Desk
hotDesk.desc: A flexible workspace allowing you to sit at any available spot in our shared areas and enjoy all services.

dedicatedDesk.title: 2. Dedicated Desk
dedicatedDesk.desc: A fixed designated desk giving you stability and a secure place to leave your tools comfortably.

semiPrivate.title: 3. Semi-Private Office
semiPrivate.audience: Small teams seeking a balance of privacy and networking.
semiPrivate.desc: An independent, smartly partitioned workspace ensuring a high degree of privacy and focus.

private1.title: 4. Private Office - 1 Desk
private1.desc: A fully enclosed, independent office for the highest levels of privacy and focus to host your clients.

private2.title: 5. Private Office - 2 Desks
private2.desc: A fully enclosed private office equipped with two integrated desks to boost productivity and collaboration.

amenities.title: Exceptional Amenities Included in All Plans
list: 24/7 Access: Secure around-the-clock access all week.
Fiber Internet: Ultra-fast and reliable connection.
Smart Devices: Printing and scanning services at your disposal.
Hospitality Area: Cafe and kitchen providing daily beverages.
Personal Lockers: Secure storage for your documents and devices.
Recreational Spaces: Designated areas for relaxation and networking.

cta.title: Shape the Future of Your Project Today!

hero.title: Event & Meeting Halls Built for Success
hero.subtitle: From board meetings to inspiring workshops; we provide smart spaces with cutting-edge tech to deliver an exceptional experience for your guests.

meetingRooms.title: Smart Meeting Rooms for Higher Productivity
meetingRooms.specs: Interactive screens, fast internet for video calls, and a focus-enhancing environment with tech support.

eventHalls.title: Event Halls & Theater to Launch Your Initiatives

hall1.title: Integrated Event Hall 1
hall1.specs: Capacity of 50. Large screen, advanced sound system, and fast internet for streaming.

hall2.title: Integrated Event Hall 2
hall2.specs: Capacity of 25. The ideal choice for workshops, equipped with a smart interactive screen.

hall3.title: Grand Space (Both Halls + Theater)
hall3.specs: Combined capacity of 85 with a fully integrated technological ecosystem at your disposal.

catering.title: Flexible Hospitality Packages for Your Event
catering.note: All packages include premium coffee, sweets, pastries, and water.

packages.name: Package One
packages.desc: Light and elegant hospitality suitable for quick meetings.

packages.name: Package Two
packages.desc: Wider options providing a distinctive coffee break experience.

packages.name: Package Three
packages.desc: Luxurious and integrated hospitality for major events and VIPs.

cta.title: Host Your Next Event at the Entrepreneurs' Destination

hero.title: Wadi Jeddah Incubator 2026: Accelerating Startups
hero.subtitle: Turn your idea into an ambitious, scalable product in an incubation program that ensures your full readiness for investment and expansion.

about.title: Program Pillars: Flexible Funding & Limitless Mentorship
about.content: The optimal model for building investment readiness and overcoming obstacles through milestone funding and an approved plan.
list: Duration: 6 months of intensive work.
Target Sectors: Biotech, Smart Cities, Food Tech (Priority to AI).
Target Batch: Only 20 outstanding startups.
Target Output: Graduating 10 market-ready companies.
Funding: Milestone-based financial support linked to targets.

support.title: An Integrated Ecosystem Supporting Every Step
list: Milestone Funding: Linked to actual performance.
Investor Access: Direct channels with Venture Capitals.
Mentorship: 1-on-1 sessions with industry leaders.
Workshops: 12 intensive sessions in product development and growth.
Government Entities: Facilitating relationships and collaboration.
Market Testing: Pilot environments for your product.
Full Flexibility: Customized support based on company needs.

strategy.title: Empowering Innovation via Vision 2030

sections.title: Faster Growth
sections.desc: Organized guidance to reduce market-entry time with high-quality products.

sections.title: Investment Readiness
sections.desc: Transforming early startups into commercial entities with proven traction.

sections.title: Supporting the Vision
sections.desc: Fostering collaboration between academia and industry to drive the economy.

strategy.note: We support the next generation of scalable companies to achieve national transformation targets.

cta.title: Turn Your Idea into a Leading Company

hero.title: Your Gateway to the Saudi Market
hero.subtitle: Integrated services for MISA licensing and legal setup for foreign companies in Jeddah.

about.title: What is the Soft Landing Program?
about.content: A program that streamlines administrative and legal procedures for international companies to establish a legal entity and grow in the Saudi market via Jeddah.

offer.title: Legal & Commercial Support | Our Services
govList: MISA Licensing: Securing your foreign investor license in Jeddah.
Legal Setup: Complete corporate registration and documentation.
Government Relations: Facilitating procedures with relevant authorities.
growthList: Pilot Projects: Test your product with Saudi partners.
Investor Access: Matchmaking with Venture Capitals.
KAU Facilities: Exclusive access to research centers.
